name: George Dimov CPA
description_short: George Dimov CPA is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.7/5 with 505 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
George Dimov CPA is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. With 505 Google reviews and a 4.7/5.0 rating, George Dimov CPA has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a accountant, accounting firm, bookkeeping service, George Dimov CPA provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. George Dimov CPA operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering George Dimov CPA should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
